problem id: 55014a7a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  10111100 -> 11000010
  11110001 -> 00000111
  01001100 -> 00000000
  01000101 -> 00010100
  10010101 -> 01010000
  11010011 -> 00001101
  11011000 -> 00000001
  00001100 -> 00000000

query: 00110101
predicted answer: 01010000
